spec.name: parallel_note_readers
spec.description: Six parallel sub-agents, each reading one note file and returning its fact, so the parent can aggregate them into summary.txt.
spec.instructions: Each sub-agent reads exactly one of the six note files (note_0.txt through note_5.txt) from <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-04-request-only__pull__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/ and returns the exact fact it contains. Do not summarize or paraphrase — return the raw fact verbatim.

request.rationale: The objective explicitly states the breadth exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget and the CORRECT move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. I need 6 sub-agents to read all 6 notes in parallel.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly states the breadth exceeds what I can process alone within my iteration budget and the CORRECT move is to delegate to parallel helper agents via the harness. I need 6 sub-agents to read all 6 notes in parallel.
